title: CAS Upload
description: Tracks each CAS file upload, its parse status, and the outcome of transaction ingestion.

s3_key.description: S3 object key for the uploaded CAS file.

upload_status.description: Lifecycle status of the CAS parse job.

parsed_fund_names.description: List of mutual fund names extracted from the CAS file.

parsed_transaction_count.description: Total number of transactions found in the CAS file before deduplication.

inserted_transaction_count.description: Number of net new transactions written to DB after deduplication.

duplicate_transaction_count.description: Number of transactions skipped because they already existed in DB.

failure_reason.description: Human-readable error message populated only when upload_status is failed.

parsed_at.description: Timestamp when parsing completed, null until then.
